sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Leaning
special_mechanics.description: Player can lean to peek around corners and obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Crouching
special_mechanics.description: Player can crouch for stealth and reduced visibility

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Player can swim in water environments

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player can climb surfaces and obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: Sword-based combat with three different attacks and parrying capability; limited proficiency and damage resistance

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Available source is Wikipedia which provides high-level gameplay descriptions but no specific physics parameters. The game emphasizes environmental interaction, sound/light mechanics, and emergent gameplay rather than precise movement tuning. No quantitative movement values documented in source material.
